plato:hasMinimumValue.rdfs:label: hasMinimumValue
plato:hasMinimumValue.rdfs:comment: Used to set a minimum value for a NumericConstant or a NumericConstantReference

plato:hasMaximumValue.rdfs:label: hasMaximumValue
plato:hasMaximumValue.rdfs:comment: Used to set a maximum value for a NumericConstant or a NumericConstantReference

plato:hasDiscreteStepValue.rdfs:label: hasDiscreteStepValue
plato:hasDiscreteStepValue.rdfs:comment: Used to set the step value for discretizing a numeric constant

plato:isPlanningConstant.rdfs:label: isPlanningConstant
plato:isPlanningConstant.rdfs:comment: Used to state that an entity is a planning constant

plato:isPlanningObject.rdfs:label: isPlanningObject
plato:isPlanningObject.rdfs:comment: Used to state that an entity is a planning object

plato:hasTimeScope.rdfs:label: hasTimeScope
plato:hasTimeScope.rdfs:comment: Used to set a time scope (i.e. 'at start','at end',' over all') for a precondition or an effect

plato:isNegated.rdfs:label: isNegated
plato:isNegated.rdfs:comment: Used to state whether the AWSSentence of a Statement is negated or not

plato:isStatic.rdfs:label: isStatic
plato:isStatic.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a AWSSentence is not a precondition or effect but rather a general statement about the domain

plato:hasOrderPosition.rdfs:label: hasOrderPosition
plato:hasOrderPosition.rdfs:comment: States the index of the entity ordered by a EntityOrder instance

plato:hasStaticValue.rdfs:label: hasStaticValue
plato:hasStaticValue.rdfs:comment: States that an instance has a static numeric value associated with it

plato:hasLogicalOperator.rdfs:label: hasLogicalOperator
plato:hasLogicalOperator.rdfs:comment: States that an advanced statement uses a specific logical operator to combine other statements.

plato:decrease.rdfs:label: decrease
plato:decrease.rdfs:comment: States that a cost should be applied to a cost function by decreasing it

plato:hasStaticInitialValue.rdfs:label: hasStaticInitialValue
plato:hasStaticInitialValue.rdfs:comment: States that a function without parameters has a static initial value

plato:minimize.rdfs:label: minimize
plato:minimize.rdfs:comment: States whether the metric should be minimized or maximized

plato:referencesValue.rdfs:label: referencesValue
plato:referencesValue.rdfs:comment: States that a NumericConstantReference is directed at a single value and not a value range

plato:hasOperatorValue.rdfs:label: hasOperatorValue
plato:hasOperatorValue.rdfs:comment: Defines which operator an EquationOperator instance resembles
